pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which copies sample_project.xml to this path.
Parsed sample_project.xml: task named 'Obtain building permits' has <UID>7</UID>.
Parsed sample_project.xml: task with <UID>7</UID> has <Name>Obtain building permits</Name>.
Parsed sample_project.xml: task 7 has <Duration>PT32H0M0S</Duration>, which is 32 hours.
Verified against task description stating 'from 4 days to 6 days'.
Calculated from 6 days and sample_project.xml's <MinutesPerDay>480</MinutesPerDay> (8 hours/day).

privileged_info_summary: The task modifies a synthetic sample project file located at /home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml. The target task is UID 7, named 'Obtain building permits', with an original duration of 32 hours (PT32H0M0S). The goal is to change its duration to 6 days, which equates to 48 hours based on the project's 8-hour workday (480 minutes per day).
